ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "incorporation_date" TEXT /* Date of incorporation */,
  "registered_office_address" TEXT /* Registered office address */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., private, public, non-profit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Financial year to which the data pertains */,
  "particulars" TEXT /* Description of the financial data (e.g., Total number of equity shares) */,
  "authorised_capital" TEXT /* Authorised capital of the company */,
  "issued_capital" TEXT /* Issued capital of the company */,
  "subscribed_capital" TEXT /* Subscribed capital of the company */,
  "paid_up_capital" TEXT /* Paid-up capital of the company */,
  "net_worth" TEXT /* Net worth of the company */,
  "total_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_yearly_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly highlight entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the highlight belongs to */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Financial year to which the highlight pertains */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue of the company for the year */,
  "net_profit" TEXT /* Net profit of the company for the year */,
  "total_expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses of the company for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_yearly_highlights_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholding_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholding pattern entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the pattern belongs to */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares held by the shareholder */,
  "percentage_of_shares" TEXT /* Percentage of shares held by the shareholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholding_patterns_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the director belongs to */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the director */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_directors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
